title: Expedition 12 Hunters Edition
description: Added firepower to explore a wide world with new biomes, dimensions, and monsters to discover and slay!
body:
Expedition 12 Hunters Edition throws you into a world full of Firepower to dominate the world!

(This is a port of my [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/expedition-12-hunters-edition) of my modpack to Modrinth. Some mods are outright removed from this version due to them not existing in the Modrinth Mods page, therefore, couldn't exactly add them. If you wish to find the Curseforge Version, join the discord)

Many popular magic mods such as Twilight Forest and Fire & Ice have been added, allowing users wanting an RPG element as you discover the new world. Oceans up to 3x their normal depth with leviathans lurking in the deep, to soaring high mountains with towers and dungeons to uncover!


Some other mod enhancements are as follows:

- Timeless and Classic Guns Zero (TaCZ)
- Vic's Point Blank (VPB)
-Optimizations 
-Overhauled vanilla structures
-Vanilla+ structures to enjoy
-Optional choice to play with friends via e4mc mod

This is the HuntersEdition of EXP12. The Hunters Edition adds some various extra mods to add a spin on the idea of sneaking around the world trying to avoid death, you now become death. Miniguns, Rocket Launchers, Guided Missles, Anti-Material Rifles, All to be found here!

The Standard Edition can be found [Here!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/expedition-12)
Join the Discord Here to see other packs I have made and to chat with the community [here](https://discord.gg/AJXhhxGR6q)
